holdings.infoBox: FLJH is an equity ETF with a total of 482 individual holdings. The top holdings are U.S. Dollar stock at 99.71%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 3.51%, Tokyo Electron at 3.06%, Toyota Motor at 3.00%, and SoftBank Group at 2.57%.

overview.description: The Franklin FTSE Japan Hedged ETF (FLJH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap companies in Japan. The fund is currency hedged for USD-based investors. FLJH was launched on Nov 2, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: FTSE Japan RIC Capped Hedged to USD Net Tax Index
